shot_notes: The Thark hordes enthusiastically agree to the plan
evidence_summary: Establish the transition from a localized political victory to a massive military mobilization. The sequence must scale from the intimate persuasion of leaders to the overwhelming visual presence of 150,000 Green Martians moving across the plains.

Leveraging his new status, John Carter proposes a massive raid on Zodanga to rescue Dejah Thoris and seize wealth. The Thark hordes enthusiastically agree, and a force of 150,000 Green Martians begins their march.
John Carter standing before Tars Tarkas and Thark leaders.
A massive column of 150,000 Green Martians marching into the distance at dusk.
Proposing a raid on Zodanga to rescue Dejah Thoris and seize wealth.
